recommendations.title: Run to You
recommendations.overview: Gianni is a serial seducer but his life is destined to change when he meets Chiara, a beautiful woman who has had an accident and is paraplegic.

recommendations.title: Like a Cat on a Highway
recommendations.overview: The story of an encounter between a bourgeois man and a poor woman, because their teenage children fall in love.

recommendations.title: Like a Cat on a Highway 2
recommendations.overview: Three years after her relationship with Giovanni, Monica is in prison and has to ask his ex for help.

recommendations.title: Thank You Guys
recommendations.overview: An actor past his prime gives drama lessons to prisoners in an attempt to stage "Waiting for Godot."

recommendations.title: Life Is Life
recommendations.overview: An elderly shepherd takes on big business when he becomes the only holdout against property developers building a luxury resort in his tiny Sardinian village.

recommendations.title: Mom or Dad?
recommendations.overview: A divorced couple fights for the custody of their three children: neither of them wants it. Mom wants to leave them to dad, and vice versa.

recommendations.title: Do You See Me?
recommendations.overview: Serena Bruno is an architect who studied and got several masters in different countries of the world but she decides to go back to Italy so she can live and work there. She will soon find out that her native country is not as open minded and she will

recommendations.title: A World Apart

recommendations.title: Welcome Mr. President!
recommendations.overview: In a small mountain village lives a man with a challenging name, Giuseppe Garibaldi (one of Italy's "fathers of the fatherland"), but everybody call him with the nickname Peppino. Love fishing, the company of friends, the library where he works as a

recommendations.title: What We Do in the Shadows
recommendations.overview: Vampire housemates try to cope with the complexities of modern life and show a newly turned hipster some of the perks of being undead.
